items.title: U.S. group calls for $652 million hemp investment from feds; how realistic is it?
items.summary: Industrial hemp advocates in the United States are seeking $652 million in federal funding for 2027, outlining an ambitious push to build supply chains, processing capacity and markets for grain […]
items.content_preview: Industrial hemp advocates in the United States are seeking $652 million in federal funding for 2027, outlining an ambitious push to build supply chains, processing capacity and markets for grain and fiber that would mark a sharp departure from the government’s limited support for the crop to date.
